name: Señor Seaside
description: Arrives with sunscreen, opinions, and a suspicious amount of confidence about where the good chairs are.

name: Palmsworth
description: Believes the perfect vacation begins with shade, a drink, and claiming a chair before breakfast.

name: Sir Floatington
description: Has no destination, no timeline, and no interest in being useful before lunch.

name: Cantina Quack
description: Claims every good story starts with, 'We were only going to have one.'

name: Cotorros
description: Knows where the conversation is loudest, the drinks are coldest, and the snacks are least guarded.

name: The Towel Baron
description: Does not run the resort, but has definitely considered forming a towel-based government.

name: Captain Swim-Up
description: Strongly believes every room should come with direct access to water and questionable decisions.

name: Moonlight Mariner
description: Appears when the sky turns gold and quietly suggests staying out just a little longer.

name: Buffet del Pato
description: Has no map, no plan, and somehow always knows when fresh dessert appears.

name: Hacienda Waddles
description: Moves slowly, judges loudly, and insists that vacation is a sacred art form.

name: Puerto Quackventuras
description: Always knows there is something nearby worth seeing, eating, drinking, or wildly misinterpreting.
